## Verification

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo build --workspace`
